calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order For An Accounting; For The Removal Of A Trustee; Or In The Alternative, Instructions Thereto Pursuant To Pobate Code 15620, 164
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Eva Womack (Respondent).

Ms. Mayo stated that the Decedent's home was the only asset in the trust, that the home was sold, that an accounting was provided in the sale and that all Beneficiaries received distribution of their percentage directly from the title company. Ms. Mayo also stated that both Trustees cooperated, that there is nothing in the Trust and that this proceeding can be terminated. The Petition for An Order for An Accounting, etc. was taken off calendar.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition By Co-Trustee Eva Womack For Allowance Of Attorneys Fees And Costs And Distribution To The Beneficiaries To Be Made Directly From Escrow And Status Of Trust Administration
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Off Calendar

Petition For An Order For An Accounting; For The Removal Of A Trustee; Or In The Alternative, Instructions Thereto Pursuant To Pobate Code 15620, 164
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order For An Accounting; For The Removal Of A Trustee; Or In The Alternative, Instructions Thereto Pursuant To Pobate Code 15620, 164
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Continued To Jul-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Eva Womack. Joseph Haselton for and with Teresa Jones.

Mr. Haselton reported that prior to the calling of this matter, Counsel met and a conferred in the hallway and the parties came into an agreement to list and sell the real property and an accounting will be submitted by June. Ms. Mayo affirms Mr. Haselton's report. The Petition for Order for an Accounting, etc. was continued to July 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For An Order For An Accounting; For The Removal Of A Trustee; Or In The Alternative, Instructions Thereto Pursuant To Pobate Code 15620, 164
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Continued To May-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Haselton for and with Teresa Jones. Eva Womack in Propria Persona.

Ms. Womack stated that she objects to being removed as Co-Trustee. The Court advised Ms. Womack that she needs to present her objection in writing for the Court to consider it, stated that the Co-Trustees need to share the file of records and file the accounting, and that the Co-Executors have equal rights, equal responsibility and equal duties. Ms. Womack stated that she can not afford an Attorney and that she does not have any objection to turning over records. The Petition for An Order for An Accounting, etc. was continued to May 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the records. Ms. Womack's objections are to be filed and the records are to be turned over by May 2, 2013.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
